calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Plaintiff'S Request For Court Judgment Against Bar Works San Francisco 1, Llc
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525. Telephone: 415-551-3730. Email: vgross@sftc.org.

Mark E. Rennie, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Arash Ghanadan, Owner/Managing Partner for plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on February 26, 2019.
Substitute on defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, occurred on April 18, 2018 and was effectuated on April 28, 2018.
Default as to defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, was entered on February 26, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 31, 2019.
Black Corporations 1-10, inclusive, were dismissed today, January 2, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bar Works San Francisco OPS, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Bar Works San Francisco 1, LLC a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $500,000.00.
Costs - $610.00.

Total - $500,610.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Continued To Feb-11-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
